# value

**Instance Property**

A pointer to information pertaining to the name field.

## Declaration

```swift
var value: UnsafeMutableRawPointer?
```

## Discussion

If the `name` field is set to the value represented by the constant [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kAuthorizationRightExecute], then set the `value` field to the full POSIX pathname of the tool you want to execute. In most other cases, set this field to `NULL`.
title: value
